name: D1 Golf Academy
address: 142 S Van Brunt St, Englewood, NJ 07631
about: The Golf Nation is a state-of-the-art indoor training studio and learning center located in Englewood, NJ. It provides year-round access to a private facility equipped with tour-level technology and expert PGA-certified coaching for players of all levels. The venue offers a mix of hourly bay rentals and flexible membership plans, focusing on data-driven swing analysis and game improvement through advanced technology like GCQuad launch monitors, 3D motion capture, and putting labs. It is designed as a community-focused space where golfers can train, connect, and pursue their goals in a supportive environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade technology like GCQuad and 3D motion capture
PGA-certified coaching with personalized, data-driven instruction
Year-round indoor practice facility unaffected by weather
Community-focused environment with a passion for the game
Flexible membership options and drop-in bay rentals

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen mentioned.
No bar or alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf equipment for practice sessions and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a BYOB policy. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for clarification on outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific details on simulator play times or 18-hole offerings.

faq.question: Is The Golf Nation kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is PGA certified to teach players of all levels and offers specific programs for juniors and youth development, as mentioned in the reviews.
